mapper.sql: id, plan_id, tenant_code, tenant_name, tenant_type, domain, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, logo_url, timezone, locale, expire_at, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from sys_tenant
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_tenant (id, plan_id, tenant_code, tenant_name, tenant_type, domain, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, logo_url, timezone, locale, expire_at, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{domain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into sys_tenant
id,
plan_id,
tenant_code,
tenant_name,
tenant_type,
domain,
contact_name,
contact_phone,
contact_email,
logo_url,

mapper.update:
update sys_tenant
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
plan_id = #{row.planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_code = #{row.tenantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_name = #{row.tenantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_type = #{row.tenantType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
domain = #{row.domain,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_name = #{row.contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_phone = #{row.contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_email = #{row.contactEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logo_url = #{row.logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
timezone = #{row.timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
locale = #{row.locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expire_at = #{row.expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update sys_tenant set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_id = #{row.planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_code = #{row.tenantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_name = #{row.tenantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_type = #{row.tenantType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, domain = #{row.domain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_name = #{row.contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_phone = #{row.contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_email = #{row.contactEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logo_url = #{row.logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, timezone = #{row.timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, locale = #{row.locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expire_at = #{row.expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update sys_tenant
plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_code = #{tenantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_name = #{tenantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_type = #{tenantType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
domain = #{domain,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_name = #{contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_phone = #{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_email = #{contactEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logo_url = #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
timezone = #{timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
locale = #{locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expire_at = #{expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_tenant set plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_code = #{tenantCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_name = #{tenantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_type = #{tenantType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, domain = #{domain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_name = #{contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_email = #{contactEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logo_url = #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, timezone = #{timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, locale = #{locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expire_at = #{expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
